0.Description: Founded and led the engineering organization for a software consulting firm; hired, mentored, and managed a team of engineers across multiple concurrent client engagements. • Defined technical strategy, set architectural standards, and owned delivery across the full stack — balancing engineering quality with client business objectives. • Built and scaled self-serve tooling and platform infrastructure used across multiple internal product lines. • Pipeline improvements drove a 75% improvement in patient quality-of-service metrics.

1.Description: Co-founded and served as CTO of a home design e-commerce platform; led all technology decisions from founding through growth, managing engineering teams across frontend, backend, and data infrastructure. • Platform was adopted by [Autodesk] for 'Picture This Kitchen' and by the U.S. Satellite Reconnaissance Office; built foundational [3D] structure-from-images technology derived from MIT dissertation research.
